site.tagline: Play. Eat. Hang out. Rent a console, PC or board game by the hour, with themed food and a full themed bar.

specials.text: Free board game with any entrée purchase.
Big Brothers Big Sisters Magic Card = a free gaming hour.
2 cocktails + 1 hour at the duo station for $30.
Free nachos with party station gaming.
Happy Hour 6-9PM. $2 OFF Shipwreck & Mutiny drinks.
Free hour of gaming with entrée purchase, 11AM-1PM.

packagesNote: A reserved table in the Guild Hall for food setup and staging
Extra hours at 15% off the standard station rate
Larger group sizes available on request

packages.name: MINECRAFT DUOS
items: Two hours on any duo station
Cake slice or free dessert for the birthday person

packages.name: BATTLE ROYALE BASH
items: Two hours at the party station
Unlimited soda refills for up to 6
Cake slice or free dessert for the birthday person

packages.name: ULTIMATE SMASH
items: Two hours on two party stations
Cake slice or free dessert for the birthday person

menu.title: RATED "E" FOR EVERYONE
menu.kick: Kids menu. Every meal includes a drink plus apple slices or fries.

items.name: Kirby's Pocket Puff
items.desc: Classic crustless PB&J.

items.name: Steve's Lava Chicken Jr.
items.desc: Two tenders, fries, tamer lava sauce (ketchup).

items.name: Koopa Kraft
items.desc: Yes, it's Kraft Mac and Cheese.

items.name: Bowser Jr. Burger
items.desc: Mini cheeseburger for the bite-sized gamer.

items.name: Pika! Pika! Cheese
items.desc: Grilled cheese.

items.name: The Cake is a Lie
items.desc: Slice of decadent chocolate cake. Or is it?

items.name: Donkey Kong Split
items.desc: Banana split, three scoops vanilla, chocolate drizzle, peanut crumbles, cherry.

items.name: Rainbow Respawn
items.desc: Assortment of brightly colored macarons.

items.name: Soft Drinks
items.desc: Pepsi products.

items.name: Tea
items.desc: Sweet or unsweet.

items.name: Energy Drinks
items.desc: Monster, Rockstar.

menu.title: THE BAR · SPECIALTY COCKTAILS
menu.foot: Every cocktail can be made zero-proof. Just ask.

items.name: Princess Peach
items.desc: Peach milkshake, vanilla ice cream, cake mix, grenadine, cake vodka.

items.name: The Speedy Blue Hedgehog
items.desc: Coconut water, white rum, pineapple, golden pineapple ring.

items.name: Rainbow Road
items.desc: Layered grenadine, coconut rum, OJ, Starry, white rum, blue curacao.

items.name: The PacMan
items.desc: Vodka, maraschino, Licor 43, lemon.

items.name: The Final Smash
items.desc: Rum, Monster, grenadine, pomegranate liqueur, cherry bitters.

items.name: Chiral Tea
items.desc: Sweet tea, pomegranate vodka, vanilla liqueur, touch of gold.

items.name: Siberian Express
items.desc: Pomegranate vodka, ginger beer, splash of Code Red.

items.name: Shirley Templar
items.desc: Starry, pomegranate vodka, grenadine, maraschino.

items.name: Ocarina of Lime
items.desc: Our take on a mojito.

items.name: The Metroidvania Shot
items.desc: Peach & apple schnapps, maraschino, cream liqueur, grenadine.

items.name: Ms. PacMan Shot
items.desc: Shot version of the PacMan.

items.name: Michelob Ultra
items.desc: Regular or non-alcoholic.

items.name: Busch Light
items.desc: Regular or non-alcoholic.

menuFoot: Plus burgers, flatbreads, loaded fries and nachos from the kitchen. Ask your server for today's specials.
